segments.text: The match is even right now
segments.original_text: さあマッチの展開イーブンで

segments.text: Even with recovery, won't make it back
segments.original_text: 復帰させてもまだ間に合わない

segments.text: Man, the spacing is really tricky
segments.original_text: いやーちょっと調整が難しい

full_text: Alright, alright, alright! The match is even right now Recovery's back! And Even with recovery, won't make it back Man, the spacing is really tricky

corrections.original: マジックの感電イーブンで
corrections.corrected: マッチの展開イーブンで
